articles.author: Grace O'Donnell
articles.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures edge up as oil turns lower in wait for Big Tech earnings - Yahoo Finance
articles.description: Wall Street is in search of the next big catalyst for AI heading into a busy week of earnings.
articles.content:
US stock futures rose on Monday morning as investors awaited Big Tech earnings, while oil prices eased after touching $90 a barrel as the US and Iran exchanged tit-for-tat attacks over the weekend.

articles.title: EU hits China’s Alibaba with €550M record fine over illegal products - politico.eu
articles.description: “There were a lot of counterfeit products, unsafe toys and dangerous cosmetics” on AliExpress, Europe’s tech chief says.
articles.content: The finding that AliExpress failed to check and tackle these risks "is very dangerous for our consumers, but its also unfair for those companies that are complying with all our rules," Virkkunen said… [+1908 chars]
